name: stefano-wiki
description: Living wiki for codebases — keeps wiki/ in sync with source code via /wiki-init, /wiki-ingest, /wiki-sync, /wiki-lint.

plugins.name: wiki-maintainer
plugins.description: Maintain a living, LLM-owned wiki of a codebase under wiki/. Adds /wiki-init, /wiki-ingest, /wiki-sync, /wiki-lint.
